# fluxLab.dev — Software Development Outsourcing & Product Studio

> Kyiv-based software development outsourcing company and product studio. Custom web & mobile development, dedicated teams, staff augmentation. 46K+ users across 800+ companies.

## What We Do

fluxLab.dev is a software development company based in Kyiv, Ukraine offering:

- **Development Outsourcing** — Dedicated development teams (2-5 senior developers) embedded in your workflow. From $8K/month.
- **Staff Augmentation** — Individual senior developers who plug into your existing team. From $4K/month per developer.
- **Custom Development** — End-to-end project-based development with fixed scope and milestones. From $15K.
- **Technical Consulting** — Architecture review, technology assessment, performance and security audits.

## Why Choose fluxLab.dev

- **Battle-tested**: We build and operate our own SaaS products (6 live products, 46K+ users). Every tool and process we recommend has been proven on our own products first.
- **Full-stack expertise**: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Go, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Docker, AWS, Hetzner Cloud.
- **Fast delivery**: 8-week MVP cycle from idea to production.
- **Transparent process**: Shared repos, weekly demos, direct Slack access.
- **European timezone**: Kyiv, Ukraine (GMT+2/+3). Convenient overlap with EU and US East Coast.
- **Cost-effective**: Senior-level talent at competitive Eastern European rates.
- **Proven track record**: Clients include energy companies, logistics operators, fintech startups, and e-commerce platforms.

## Our Products (Proof of Expertise)

- [Jobber](https://jobber.fluxlab.dev): AI-powered job tracker — 15,300 users. Go, Next.js, Claude AI.
- [EFluxCom](https://efluxcom.com): Energy management platform — 12,400 users, 85 companies.
- [WashFlow](https://washflow.app): Business management suite — 8,700 users, 120 companies.
- [Accounting](https://flux-lab.dev/en/projects/accounting): Financial management — 6,200 users, 340 companies.
- [Market](https://flux-lab.dev/en/projects/market): E-commerce marketplace — beta, 3,400 users.
- [LifeSpan](https://flux-lab.dev/en/projects/lifespan): Health tracking app — coming soon.

## Tech Stack

- Frontend: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, React Native
- Backend: Go, Node.js, NestJS
- Databases: PostgreSQL, Redis
- DevOps: Docker, Hetzner Cloud, AWS, GitHub Actions, Terraform
- AI: Claude API (Anthropic)

## Engagement Models

| Model | Starting Price | Best For |
|-------|---------------|----------|
| Dedicated Team | $8K/month | Long-term product development |
| Project-Based | $15K | Well-defined products with deadlines |
| Staff Augmentation | $4K/month per dev | Filling skill gaps fast |

## Client Testimonials

- "Reduced our energy monitoring costs by 27% in the first quarter." — Oleksandr Melnyk, CTO, GreenGrid Energy
- "Went from spreadsheets to managing 120 locations in one platform." — Iryna Savchenko, Founder, CleanWave
- "890K+ invoices processed with zero downtime. Saved 40 hours per week." — Viktor Kravchuk, CFO, Finova Partners
